# ExtensionConfig.Intent

**Object**

Instructions for accessing your media service’s intent endpoints.

## Declaration

```swift
object ExtensionConfig.Intent
```

## Requiring Headers for All Intent Requests

- **ExtensionConfig.Intent.Hdr**: Headers to include with requests to intent endpoints.

## Specifying Required Headers and Supported Processing for Each Intent

- **ExtensionConfig.Intent.AddMedia**: Configuration details for your service’s add media intent.
- **ExtensionConfig.Intent.PlayMedia**: Configuration details for your service’s play media intent.
- **ExtensionConfig.Intent.UpdateMediaAffinity**: Configuration details for your service’s update media affinity intent.

## Describing Supported Intent Endpoints

- **ExtensionEndpointConfig**: Instructions for accessing an intent endpoint.
